Exact captured-source digests take priority over caller-declared file/URL mappings; target, frame, script, and worker ambiguity remains explicit, and source-map authority stays separate.";
            effects: ToolEffects;
            examples: readonly [
                {
                    input: {
                        runtime_observations: (
                            | {
                                analysis_profile: {
                                    digest: string;
                                    parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                                    provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string };
                                    provider_profile_schema_version: number;
                                    schema_version: 1;
                                };
                                authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                                | "controlled-replay"
                                | "historical-reference"
                                | "external-service"
                                | "analyst-inference";
                                confidence: "observed"
                                | "derived"
                                | "inferred";
                                environment:
                                    | {
                                        architecture: string;
                                        id: string;
                                        isolation: (...)
                                        | (...)
                                        | (...)
                                        | (...);
                                        platform: string;
                                    }
                                    | null;
                                evidence_id: string;
                                evidence_links: string[];
                                limitations: string[];
                                locations: (
                                    | { address: ...; kind: ... }
                                    | { end: ...; kind: ...; start: ... }
                                    | { kind: ...; path: ... }
                                    | { kind: ...; offset: ... }
                                    | { end: ...; kind: ...; start: ... }
                                )[];
                                normalized_result: JSONType;
                                operation: string;
                                parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                                predicate_type: string;
                                provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string | null };
                                raw_result: JSONType;
                                schema_version: 2;
                                subject:
                                    | {
                                        architecture: (...)
                                        | (...)
                                        | (...)
                                        | (...)
                                        | (...);
                                        digest: { sha256: ... };
                                        format:
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...);
                                        local_path: string;
                                        name: string;
                                    }
                                    | null;
                            }
                            | {
                                authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                                | "controlled-replay"
                                | "historical-reference"
                                | "external-service"
                                | "analyst-inference";
                                confidence: "observed"
                                | "derived"
                                | "inferred";
                                environment:
                                    | {
                                        architecture: string;
                                        id: string;
                                        isolation: (...)
                                        | (...)
                                        | (...)
                                        | (...);
                                        platform: string;
                                    }
                                    | null;
                                evidence_id: string;
                                evidence_links: string[];
                                limitations: string[];
                                locations: (
                                    | { address: ...; kind: ... }
                                    | { end: ...; kind: ...; start: ... }
                                    | { kind: ...; path: ... }
                                    | { kind: ...; offset: ... }
                                    | { end: ...; kind: ...; start: ... }
                                )[];
                                normalized_result: JSONType;
                                operation: string;
                                parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                                predicate_type: string;
                                provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string | null };
                                raw_result: JSONType;
                                schema_version: 2;
                                subject:
                                    | {
                                        architecture: (...)
                                        | (...)
                                        | (...)
                                        | (...)
                                        | (...);
                                        digest: { sha256: ... };
                                        format:
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...);
                                        local_path: string;
                                        name: string;
                                    }
                                    | null;
                            }
                        )[];
                        static_layers: {
                            analysis: | {
                                analysis_profile: {
                                    digest: string;
                                    parameters: Record<(...), (...)>;
                                    provider: { id: ...; name: ...; version: ... };
                                    provider_profile_schema_version: number;
                                    schema_version: 1;
                                };
                                authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                                | "controlled-replay"
                                | "historical-reference"
                                | "external-service"
                                | "analyst-inference";
                                confidence: "observed"
                                | "derived"
                                | "inferred";
                                environment:
                                    | { architecture: ...; id: ...; isolation: ...; platform: ... }
                                    | null;
                                evidence_id: string;
                                evidence_links: string[];
                                limitations: string[];
                                locations: ((...) | (...) | (...) | (...) | (...))[];
                                normalized_result: JSONType;
                                operation: string;
                                parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                                predicate_type: string;
                                provider: { id: string; name: string; version: (...) | (...) };
                                raw_result: JSONType;
                                schema_version: 2;
                                subject:
                                    | {
                                        architecture: ...;
                                        digest: ...;
                                        format: ...;
                                        local_path: ...;
                                        name: ...;
                                    }
                                    | null;
                            }
                            | {
                                authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                                | "controlled-replay"
                                | "historical-reference"
                                | "external-service"
                                | "analyst-inference";
                                confidence: "observed"
                                | "derived"
                                | "inferred";
                                environment:
                                    | { architecture: ...; id: ...; isolation: ...; platform: ... }
                                    | null;
                                evidence_id: string;
                                evidence_links: string[];
                                limitations: string[];
                                locations: ((...) | (...) | (...) | (...) | (...))[];
                                normalized_result: JSONType;
                                operation: string;
                                parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                                predicate_type: string;
                                provider: { id: string; name: string; version: (...) | (...) };
                                raw_result: JSONType;
                                schema_version: 2;
                                subject:
                                    | {
                                        architecture: ...;
                                        digest: ...;
                                        format: ...;
                                        local_path: ...;
                                        name: ...;
                                    }
                                    | null;
                            };
                            role: string;
                        }[];
                    };
                    title: "Reconcile one passive Electron capture";
                },
            ];
            inputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    limits: ZodDefault<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                max_reconciliation_items: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_runtime_entities: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_static_load_states: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                            },
                            $strict,
                        >,
                    >;
                    runtime_observations: ZodArray<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                                    ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            digest: ZodString;
                                            parameters: ZodRecord<(...), (...)>;
                                            provider: ZodObject<(...), (...)>;
                                            provider_profile_schema_version: ZodNumber;
                                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<(...)>;
                                        },
                                        $strip,
                                    >,
                                >;
                                authority: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                                        "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                                        "external-service": "external-service";
                                        "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                                        "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                                    },
                                >;
                                confidence: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        derived: "derived";
                                        inferred: "inferred";
                                        observed: "observed";
                                    },
                                >;
                                environment: ZodNullable<
                                    ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            architecture: ZodString;
                                            id: ZodString;
                                            isolation: ZodEnum<(...)>;
                                            platform: ZodString;
                                        },
                                        $strip,
                                    >,
                                >;
                                evidence_id: ZodString;
                                evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                locations: ZodArray<
                                    ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                                        [
                                            ZodObject<(...), (...)>,
                                            ZodObject<(...), (...)>,
                                            ZodObject<(...), (...)>,
                                            ZodObject<(...), (...)>,
                                            ZodObject<(...), (...)>,
                                        ],
                                        "kind",
                                    >,
                                >;
                                normalized_result: ZodJSONSchema;
                                operation: ZodString;
                                parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                predicate_type: ZodString;
                                provider: ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        id: ZodString;
                                        name: ZodString;
                                        version: ZodNullable<ZodString>;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >;
                                raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                                schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                                subject: ZodNullable<
                                    ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            architecture: ZodNullable<(...)>;
                                            digest: ZodObject<(...), (...)>;
                                            format: ZodEnum<(...)>;
                                            local_path: ZodString;
                                            name: ZodString;
                                        },
                                        $strip,
                                    >,
                                >;
                            },
                            $strict,
                        >,
                    >;
                    static_layers: ZodArray<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                analysis: ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        analysis_profile: ZodOptional<ZodObject<(...), (...)>>;
                                        authority: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                "analyst-inference": ...;
                                                "controlled-replay": ...;
                                                "external-service": ...;
                                                "historical-reference": ...;
                                                "shipped-artifact": ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        confidence: ZodEnum<{ derived: ...; inferred: ...; observed: ... }>;
                                        environment: ZodNullable<ZodObject<(...), (...)>>;
                                        evidence_id: ZodString;
                                        evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        locations: ZodArray<ZodDiscriminatedUnion<(...), (...)>>;
                                        normalized_result: ZodJSONSchema;
                                        operation: ZodString;
                                        parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                        predicate_type: ZodString;
                                        provider: ZodObject<{ id: ...; name: ...; version: ... }, $strip>;
                                        raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                                        schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                                        subject: ZodNullable<ZodObject<(...), (...)>>;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >;
                                role: ZodEnum<
                                    { application: "application"; assets: "assets"; cache: "cache" },
                                >;
                                runtime_mappings: ZodDefault<
                                    ZodArray<ZodDiscriminatedUnion<[(...), (...)], "kind">>,
                                >;
                            },
                            $strict,
                        >,
                    >;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
            kind: "electron-provider";
            name: "reconcile_javascript_runtime";
            outputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    evidence_id: ZodString;
                    evidence_uri: ZodString;
                    result: ZodType<unknown, unknown, $ZodTypeInternals<unknown, unknown>>;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
            title: string;
        },
        {
            annotations: DerivedToolAnnotations;
            description: "Trace a typed literal seed through an authenticated JavaScript Application Graph with explicit direction, depth, node, edge, and path bounds. Original static, native, passive-runtime, inferred, and unknown authorities remain distinct; native addon handoffs never open a provider or execute the application.";
            effects: ToolEffects;
            examples: readonly [
                {
                    input: {
                        application: | {
                            analysis_profile: {
                                digest: string;
                                parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                                provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string };
                                provider_profile_schema_version: number;
                                schema_version: 1;
                            };
                            authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                            | "controlled-replay"
                            | "historical-reference"
                            | "external-service"
                            | "analyst-inference";
                            confidence: "observed"
                            | "derived"
                            | "inferred";
                            environment:
                                | {
                                    architecture: string;
                                    id: string;
                                    isolation: "process"
                                    | "none"
                                    | "container"
                                    | "virtual-machine";
                                    platform: string;
                                }
                                | null;
                            evidence_id: string;
                            evidence_links: string[];
                            limitations: string[];
                            locations: (
                                | { address: string; kind: "address" }
                                | { end: string; kind: "address-range"; start: string }
                                | { kind: "artifact-path"; path: string }
                                | { kind: "file-offset"; offset: number }
                                | { end: number; kind: "file-offset-range"; start: number }
                            )[];
                            normalized_result: JSONType;
                            operation: string;
                            parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                            predicate_type: string;
                            provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string | null };
                            raw_result: JSONType;
                            schema_version: 2;
                            subject:
                                | {
                                    architecture: "x86"
                                    | "x86_64"
                                    | "arm"
                                    | "arm64"
                                    | null;
                                    digest: { sha256: string };
                                    format:
                                        | "unknown"
                                        | "file"
                                        | "directory"
                                        | "javascript"
                                        | "source-map"
                                        | "plist"
                                        | "entitlements"
                                        | "dmg"
                                        | "zip"
                                        | "pkg"
                                        | "asar"
                                        | "javascript-bundle"
                                        | "mach-o-universal"
                                        | "mach-o"
                                        | "elf"
                                        | "pe"
                                        | "hopper"
                                        | "analysis-database"
                                        | "ipa"
                                        | "apk";
                                    local_path: string;
                                    name: string;
                                }
                                | null;
                        }
                        | {
                            authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                            | "controlled-replay"
                            | "historical-reference"
                            | "external-service"
                            | "analyst-inference";
                            confidence: "observed"
                            | "derived"
                            | "inferred";
                            environment:
                                | {
                                    architecture: string;
                                    id: string;
                                    isolation: "process"
                                    | "none"
                                    | "container"
                                    | "virtual-machine";
                                    platform: string;
                                }
                                | null;
                            evidence_id: string;
                            evidence_links: string[];
                            limitations: string[];
                            locations: (
                                | { address: string; kind: "address" }
                                | { end: string; kind: "address-range"; start: string }
                                | { kind: "artifact-path"; path: string }
                                | { kind: "file-offset"; offset: number }
                                | { end: number; kind: "file-offset-range"; start: number }
                            )[];
                            normalized_result: JSONType;
                            operation: string;
                            parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                            predicate_type: string;
                            provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string | null };
                            raw_result: JSONType;
                            schema_version: 2;
                            subject:
                                | {
                                    architecture: "x86"
                                    | "x86_64"
                                    | "arm"
                                    | "arm64"
                                    | null;
                                    digest: { sha256: string };
                                    format:
                                        | "unknown"
                                        | "file"
                                        | "directory"
                                        | "javascript"
                                        | "source-map"
                                        | "plist"
                                        | "entitlements"
                                        | "dmg"
                                        | "zip"
                                        | "pkg"
                                        | "asar"
                                        | "javascript-bundle"
                                        | "mach-o-universal"
                                        | "mach-o"
                                        | "elf"
                                        | "pe"
                                        | "hopper"
                                        | "analysis-database"
                                        | "ipa"
                                        | "apk";
                                    local_path: string;
                                    name: string;
                                }
                                | null;
                        };
                        direction: "both";
                        seed: {
                            case_sensitive: boolean;
                            kind: "module";
                            match: "exact";
                            value: string;
                        };
                    };
                    title: "Trace one module seed through a retained application graph";
                },
            ];
            inputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    application: ZodObject<
                        {
                            analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        digest: ZodString;
                                        parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                        provider: ZodObject<{ id: ...; name: ...; version: ... }, $strip>;
                                        provider_profile_schema_version: ZodNumber;
                                        schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                            authority: ZodEnum<
                                {
                                    "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                                    "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                                    "external-service": "external-service";
                                    "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                                    "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                                },
                            >;
                            confidence: ZodEnum<
                                { derived: "derived"; inferred: "inferred"; observed: "observed" },
                            >;
                            environment: ZodNullable<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        architecture: ZodString;
                                        id: ZodString;
                                        isolation: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                container: ...;
                                                none: ...;
                                                process: ...;
                                                "virtual-machine": ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        platform: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                            evidence_id: ZodString;
                            evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            locations: ZodArray<
                                ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                                    [
                                        ZodObject<{ address: ...; kind: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ end: ...; kind: ...; start: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ kind: ...; path: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ kind: ...; offset: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ end: ...; kind: ...; start: ... }, $strip>,
                                    ],
                                    "kind",
                                >,
                            >;
                            normalized_result: ZodJSONSchema;
                            operation: ZodString;
                            parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                            predicate_type: ZodString;
                            provider: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    id: ZodString;
                                    name: ZodString;
                                    version: ZodNullable<ZodString>;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                            subject: ZodNullable<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        architecture: ZodNullable<ZodEnum<(...)>>;
                                        digest: ZodObject<{ sha256: ... }, $strip>;
                                        format: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                "analysis-database": ...;
                                                apk: ...;
                                                asar: ...;
                                                directory: ...;
                                                dmg: ...;
                                                elf: ...;
                                                entitlements: ...;
                                                file: ...;
                                                hopper: ...;
                                                ipa: ...;
                                                javascript: ...;
                                                "javascript-bundle": ...;
                                                "mach-o": ...;
                                                "mach-o-universal": ...;
                                                pe: ...;
                                                pkg: ...;
                                                plist: ...;
                                                "source-map": ...;
                                                unknown: ...;
                                                zip: ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        local_path: ZodString;
                                        name: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                        },
                        $strict,
                    >;
                    direction: ZodDefault<
                        ZodEnum<
                            { both: "both"; incoming: "incoming"; outgoing: "outgoing" },
                        >,
                    >;
                    limits: ZodDefault<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                max_depth: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_edges: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_nodes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_paths: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_seed_matches: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                            },
                            $strict,
                        >,
                    >;
                    native_observations: ZodDefault<
                        ZodArray<
                            ZodObject<
                                {
                                    analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                digest: ...;
                                                parameters: ...;
                                                provider: ...;
                                                provider_profile_schema_version: ...;
                                                schema_version: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    authority: ZodEnum<
                                        {
                                            "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                                            "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                                            "external-service": "external-service";
                                            "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                                            "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    confidence: ZodEnum<
                                        {
                                            derived: "derived";
                                            inferred: "inferred";
                                            observed: "observed";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    environment: ZodNullable<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            { architecture: ...; id: ...; isolation: ...; platform: ... },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    evidence_id: ZodString;
                                    evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    locations: ZodArray<
                                        ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                                            [(...), (...), (...), (...), (...)],
                                            "kind",
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    normalized_result: ZodJSONSchema;
                                    operation: ZodString;
                                    parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                    predicate_type: ZodString;
                                    provider: ZodObject<
                                        { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodNullable<(...)> },
                                        $strip,
                                    >;
                                    raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                                    schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                                    subject: ZodNullable<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                architecture: ...;
                                                digest: ...;
                                                format: ...;
                                                local_path: ...;
                                                name: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >,
                        >,
                    >;
                    seed: ZodObject<
                        {
                            case_sensitive: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                            kind: ZodEnum<
                                {
                                    api: "api";
                                    channel: "channel";
                                    module: "module";
                                    "native-export": "native-export";
                                    "node-id": "node-id";
                                    route: "route";
                                    string: "string";
                                },
                            >;
                            match: ZodDefault<
                                ZodNullable<ZodEnum<{ contains: "contains"; exact: "exact" }>>,
                            >;
                            value: ZodString;
                        },
                        $strict,
                    >;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
            kind: "application";
            name: "trace_application_feature";
            outputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    evidence_id: ZodString;
                    evidence_uri: ZodString;
                    result: ZodType<unknown, unknown, $ZodTypeInternals<unknown, unknown>>;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
            title: string;
        },
        {
            annotations: DerivedToolAnnotations;
            description: "Compare two authenticated JavaScript Application Graph versions using unique-only exact digest, module source digest, source-map identity, structural fingerprint, and non-module semantic-key tiers. Reports added, removed, changed, ambiguous, and unknown entities plus a bounded changed_from graph without fuzzy or module-ordinal pairing.";
            effects: ToolEffects;
            examples: readonly [
                {
                    input: {
                        left: | {
                            analysis_profile: {
                                digest: string;
                                parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                                provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string };
                                provider_profile_schema_version: number;
                                schema_version: 1;
                            };
                            authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                            | "controlled-replay"
                            | "historical-reference"
                            | "external-service"
                            | "analyst-inference";
                            confidence: "observed"
                            | "derived"
                            | "inferred";
                            environment:
                                | {
                                    architecture: string;
                                    id: string;
                                    isolation: "process"
                                    | "none"
                                    | "container"
                                    | "virtual-machine";
                                    platform: string;
                                }
                                | null;
                            evidence_id: string;
                            evidence_links: string[];
                            limitations: string[];
                            locations: (
                                | { address: string; kind: "address" }
                                | { end: string; kind: "address-range"; start: string }
                                | { kind: "artifact-path"; path: string }
                                | { kind: "file-offset"; offset: number }
                                | { end: number; kind: "file-offset-range"; start: number }
                            )[];
                            normalized_result: JSONType;

                            predicate_type: string;

                            raw_result: JSONType;
                            schema_version: 2;
                            subject:
                                | {
                                    architecture: "x86"
                                    | "x86_64"
                                    | "arm"
                                    | "arm64"
                                    | null;
                                    digest: { sha256: string };
                                    format:
                                        | "unknown"
                                        | "file"
                                        | "directory"
                                        | "javascript"
                                        | "source-map"

                                        | "apk";

                                }
                                | null;
                        }

            inputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    left: ZodObject<
                        {
                            analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        digest: ZodString;
                                        parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                        provider: ZodObject<{ id: ...; name: ...; version: ... }, $strip>;
                                        provider_profile_schema_version: ZodNumber;
                                        schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                            authority: ZodEnum<
                                {
                                    "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                                    "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                                    "external-service": "external-service";
                                    "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                                    "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                                },
                            >;
                            confidence: ZodEnum<
                                { derived: "derived"; inferred: "inferred"; observed: "observed" },
                            >;
                            environment: ZodNullable<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        architecture: ZodString;
                                        id: ZodString;
                                        isolation: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                container: ...;
                                                none: ...;
                                                process: ...;
                                                "virtual-machine": ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        platform: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                            evidence_id: ZodString;
                            evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            locations: ZodArray<
                                ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                                    [
                                        ZodObject<{ address: ...; kind: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ end: ...; kind: ...; start: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ kind: ...; path: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ kind: ...; offset: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ end: ...; kind: ...; start: ... }, $strip>,
                                    ],
                                    "kind",
                                >,
                            >;
                            normalized_result: ZodJSONSchema;
                            operation: ZodString;
                            parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                            predicate_type: ZodString;
                            provider: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    id: ZodString;
                                    name: ZodString;
                                    version: ZodNullable<ZodString>;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                            subject: ZodNullable<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        architecture: ZodNullable<ZodEnum<(...)>>;
                                        digest: ZodObject<{ sha256: ... }, $strip>;
                                        format: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                "analysis-database": ...;
                                                apk: ...;
                                                asar: ...;
                                                directory: ...;
                                                dmg: ...;
                                                elf: ...;
                                                entitlements: ...;
                                                file: ...;
                                                hopper: ...;
                                                ipa: ...;
                                                javascript: ...;
                                                "javascript-bundle": ...;
                                                "mach-o": ...;
                                                "mach-o-universal": ...;
                                                pe: ...;
                                                pkg: ...;
                                                plist: ...;
                                                "source-map": ...;
                                                unknown: ...;
                                                zip: ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        local_path: ZodString;
                                        name: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                        },
                        $strict,
                    >;
                    left_native_observations: ZodDefault<
                        ZodArray<
                            ZodObject<
                                {
                                    analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                digest: ...;

                                        {

                                            "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                                            "external-service": "external-service";
                                            "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                                            "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                                        },
                                    >;

                                        {
                                            derived: "derived";
                                            inferred: "inferred";
                                            observed: "observed";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    environment: ZodNullable<

                                            { architecture: ...; id: ...; isolation: ...; platform: ... },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;

                                    evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;

                                        ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                                            [(...), (...), (...), (...), (...)],
                                            "kind",
                                        >,
                                    >;

                                    operation: ZodString;
                                    parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                    predicate_type: ZodString;
                                    provider: ZodObject<

                                        $strip,
                                    >;

                                        ZodObject<

                                                name: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >,
                        >,
                    >;

                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                max_candidate_nodes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_comparison_items: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_graph_edges: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_graph_nodes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                            },
                            $strict,
                        >,
                    >;
                    right: ZodObject<
                        {
                            analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        digest: ZodString;
                                        parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                        provider: ZodObject<{ id: ...; name: ...; version: ... }, $strip>;
                                        provider_profile_schema_version: ZodNumber;
                                        schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                            authority: ZodEnum<
                                {
                                    "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                                    "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                                    "external-service": "external-service";
                                    "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                                    "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                                },
                            >;
                            confidence: ZodEnum<
                                { derived: "derived"; inferred: "inferred"; observed: "observed" },
                            >;
                            environment: ZodNullable<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        architecture: ZodString;
                                        id: ZodString;
                                        isolation: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                container: ...;
                                                none: ...;
                                                process: ...;
                                                "virtual-machine": ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        platform: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                            evidence_id: ZodString;
                            evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            locations: ZodArray<
                                ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                                    [
                                        ZodObject<{ address: ...; kind: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ end: ...; kind: ...; start: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ kind: ...; path: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ kind: ...; offset: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ end: ...; kind: ...; start: ... }, $strip>,
                                    ],
                                    "kind",
                                >,
                            >;

                            operation: ZodString;
                            parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                            predicate_type: ZodString;
                            provider: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    id: ZodString;
                                    name: ZodString;
                                    version: ZodNullable<ZodString>;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;

                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                            subject: ZodNullable<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        architecture: ZodNullable<ZodEnum<(...)>>;
                                        digest: ZodObject<{ sha256: ... }, $strip>;
                                        format: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                "analysis-database": ...;
                                                apk: ...;
                                                asar: ...;
                                                directory: ...;
                                                dmg: ...;
                                                elf: ...;
                                                entitlements: ...;
                                                file: ...;
                                                hopper: ...;
                                                ipa: ...;

                                                "javascript-bundle": ...;
                                                "mach-o": ...;
                                                "mach-o-universal": ...;
                                                pe: ...;
                                                pkg: ...;
                                                plist: ...;
                                                "source-map": ...;
                                                unknown: ...;
                                                zip: ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        local_path: ZodString;
                                        name: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                        },
                        $strict,
                    >;
                    right_native_observations: ZodDefault<
                        ZodArray<
                            ZodObject<
                                {
                                    analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                digest: ...;
                                                parameters: ...;
                                                provider: ...;
                                                provider_profile_schema_version: ...;
                                                schema_version: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    authority: ZodEnum<
                                        {
                                            "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                                            "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                                            "external-service": "external-service";
                                            "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                                            "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    confidence: ZodEnum<
                                        {
                                            derived: "derived";
                                            inferred: "inferred";
                                            observed: "observed";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    environment: ZodNullable<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            { architecture: ...; id: ...; isolation: ...; platform: ... },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    evidence_id: ZodString;
                                    evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    locations: ZodArray<
                                        ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                                            [(...), (...), (...), (...), (...)],
                                            "kind",
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    normalized_result: ZodJSONSchema;
                                    operation: ZodString;
                                    parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                    predicate_type: ZodString;
                                    provider: ZodObject<
                                        { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodNullable<(...)> },
                                        $strip,
                                    >;
                                    raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                                    schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                                    subject: ZodNullable<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                architecture: ...;
                                                digest: ...;
                                                format: ...;
                                                local_path: ...;
                                                name: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >,
                        >,
                    >;
                    unknown_registry_approved: ZodOptional<ZodLiteral<true>>;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
            kind: "application";
            name: "compare_application_versions";
            outputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    evidence_id: ZodString;
                    evidence_uri: ZodString;
                    result: ZodType<unknown, unknown, $ZodTypeInternals<unknown, unknown>>;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
            title: string;
        },
        {
            annotations: DerivedToolAnnotations;
            description: "Plan or execute a content-bound extracted-module JavaScript replay inside the Linux Bubblewrap, seccomp, and cgroup boundary. Execution requires approved: true and the exact plan digest. Supports deterministic boundary cases and optional left/right differential comparison; observations have controlled-replay authority and do not claim real application runtime behavior.";
            effects: ToolEffects;
            examples: readonly [
                {
                    input: {
                        approved: false;
                        cases: [{ arguments: [""]; case_id: "empty" }];
                        determinism: {
                            clock_iso: "2000-01-01T00:00:00.000Z";
                            locale: "en-US";
                            platform: "linux";
                            random_seed: 0;
                            timezone: "UTC";
                        };
                        left: {
                            entry_alias: "parser";
                            entry_export: "default";
                            modules: [
                                {
                                    alias: "parser";
                                    dependencies: {};
                                    format: "esm";
                                    path: "/approved/parser.mjs";
                                    role: "module";
                                },
                            ];
                        };
                        limits: {
                            cpu_quota_percent: 50;
                            input_bytes: 262144;
                            memory_bytes: 134217728;
                            module_bytes: 4194304;
                            output_bytes: 524288;
                            protocol_bytes: 16777216;
                            result_depth: 16;
                            result_nodes: 10000;
                            stderr_bytes: 32768;
                            tasks: 8;
                            tmpfs_bytes: 16777216;
                            wall_time_ms: 3000;
                        };
                        mode: "plan";
                    };
                    title: "Plan one extracted ESM parser replay";
                },
            ];
            inputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    approved: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                    cases: ZodDefault<
                        ZodArray<
                            ZodObject<
                                { arguments: ZodArray<ZodJSONSchema>; case_id: ZodString },
                                $strict,
                            >,
                        >,
                    >;
                    determinism: ZodDefault<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                clock_iso: ZodDefault<ZodISODateTime>;
                                locale: ZodDefault<ZodLiteral<"en-US">>;
                                platform: ZodDefault<ZodLiteral<"linux">>;
                                random_seed: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                timezone: ZodDefault<ZodLiteral<"UTC">>;
                            },
                            $strict,
                        >,
                    >;

                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                count: ZodNumber;
                                preset: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        "clipboard-boundaries": "clipboard-boundaries";
                                        "parser-boundaries": "parser-boundaries";
                                        "sanitizer-boundaries": "sanitizer-boundaries";
                                    },
                                >;

                            },
                            $strict,
                        >,
                    >;

                        {
                            entry_alias: ZodString;

                            modules: ZodArray<

                                    {

                                        format: ZodEnum<{ "commonjs-factory": ...; esm: ... }>;

                                        role: ZodDefault<ZodEnum<(...)>>;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                        },
                        $strict,
                    >;

                            {

                                predicate_type: ZodString;
                                provider: ZodObject<
                                    {

                                >;

                                subject: ZodNullable<
                                    ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            architecture: ZodNullable<(...)>;
                                            digest: ZodObject<(...), (...)>;
