                    >;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
            title: string;
        },
        {
            annotations: DerivedToolAnnotations;
            description: "Prepare a hash-bound Node/JavaScript characterization plan and deterministic reversible export transformation without executing target code. The exact source, selected byte range, runtime closure, sandbox profile, cases, and limits are committed for separate execution approval.";
            effects: ToolEffects;
            examples: readonly [
                {
                    input: Record<string, JSONType>;
                    title: "Prepare one exact bundled callable characterization";
                },
            ];
            inputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    expected_effect: ZodEnum<
                        { "observation-only": "observation-only"; pure: "pure" },
                    >;
                    instrumentation: ZodObject<
                        {
                            artifact_path: ZodString;
                            artifact_sha256: ZodString;
                            selection: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    byte_end: ZodNumber;
                                    byte_start: ZodNumber;
                                    export_name: ZodString;
                                    selected_sha256: ZodString;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;
                        },
                        $strict,
                    >;
                    preparation_approved: ZodLiteral<true>;
                    replay: ZodObject<
                        {
                            approved: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                            cases: ZodDefault<
                                ZodArray<
                                    ZodObject<
                                        { arguments: ZodArray<(...)>; case_id: ZodString },
                                        $strict,
                                    >,
                                >,
                            >;
                            determinism: ZodDefault<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        clock_iso: ZodDefault<ZodISODateTime>;
                                        locale: ZodDefault<ZodLiteral<(...)>>;
                                        platform: ZodDefault<ZodLiteral<(...)>>;
                                        random_seed: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                        timezone: ZodDefault<ZodLiteral<(...)>>;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                            generator: ZodOptional<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        count: ZodNumber;
                                        preset: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                "clipboard-boundaries": ...;
                                                "parser-boundaries": ...;
                                                "sanitizer-boundaries": ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        seed: ZodNumber;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                            left: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    entry_alias: ZodString;
                                    entry_export: ZodDefault<ZodString>;
                                    modules: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                alias: ...;
                                                dependencies: ...;
                                                format: ...;
                                                path: ...;
                                                role: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strict,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;
                            limits: ZodDefault<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        cpu_quota_percent: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                        input_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                        memory_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                        module_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                        output_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                        protocol_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                        result_depth: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                        result_nodes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                        stderr_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                        tasks: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                        tmpfs_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                        wall_time_ms: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                            mode: ZodEnum<{ execute: "execute"; plan: "plan" }>;
                            plan_digest: ZodOptional<ZodString>;
                            reproducer_export: ZodOptional<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        approved: ZodBoolean;
                                        include_sources: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                                        path: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                            right: ZodOptional<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        entry_alias: ZodString;
                                        entry_export: ZodDefault<ZodString>;
                                        modules: ZodArray<ZodObject<(...), (...)>>;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                        },
                        $strict,
                    >;
                    selected_alias: ZodString;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
            kind: "application";
            name: "prepare_node_characterization";
            outputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    phase: ZodLiteral<"preparation">;
                    plan: ZodObject<
                        {
                            allowed_boundaries: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            artifact: ZodObject<
                                { byte_length: ZodNumber; path: ZodString; sha256: ZodString },
                                $strict,
                            >;
                            authority: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    execution_approved: ZodLiteral<false>;
                                    network: ZodEnum<{ loopback: "loopback"; none: "none" }>;
                                    preparation_approved: ZodLiteral<true>;
                                    provider_owned_process_only: ZodLiteral<true>;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;
                            callable: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    callable_id: ZodString;
                                    export_name: ZodString;
                                    module_id: ZodString;
                                    selector_sha256: ZodString;
                                    semantic_evidence_id: ZodNullable<ZodString>;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;
                            determinism: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    clock: ZodEnum<{ fixed: "fixed"; real: "real" }>;
                                    identifiers: ZodEnum<
                                        { deterministic: "deterministic"; runtime: "runtime" },
                                    >;
                                    randomness: ZodEnum<{ seeded: "seeded"; system: "system" }>;
                                    seed: ZodNumber;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;
                            expected_effect: ZodEnum<
                                {
                                    "bounded-effects": "bounded-effects";
                                    "observation-only": "observation-only";
                                    pure: "pure";
                                },
                            >;
                            isolated_home: ZodString;
                            limits: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    idle_timeout_ms: ZodNumber;
                                    max_bytes: ZodNumber;
                                    max_calls: ZodNumber;
                                    max_files: ZodNumber;
                                    max_handles: ZodNumber;
                                    max_processes: ZodNumber;
                                    timeout_ms: ZodNumber;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;
                            plan_sha256: ZodString;
                            preparation_sha256: ZodString;
                            runtime: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    executable_path: ZodString;
                                    executable_sha256: ZodString;
                                    family: ZodString;
                                    profile_sha256: ZodString;
                                    provider_id: ZodString;
                                    version: ZodString;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;
                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            working_directory: ZodString;
                        },
                        $strict,
                    >;
                    replay: ZodObject<
                        {
                            evidence: ZodNullable<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        analysis_profile: ZodOptional<ZodObject<(...), (...)>>;
                                        authority: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                "analyst-inference": ...;
                                                "controlled-replay": ...;
                                                "external-service": ...;
                                                "historical-reference": ...;
                                                "shipped-artifact": ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        confidence: ZodEnum<{ derived: ...; inferred: ...; observed: ... }>;
                                        environment: ZodNullable<ZodObject<(...), (...)>>;
                                        evidence_id: ZodString;
                                        evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        locations: ZodArray<ZodDiscriminatedUnion<(...), (...)>>;
                                        normalized_result: ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                cleanup: ...;
                                                comparison: ...;
                                                limitations: ...;
                                                outcomes: ...;
                                                plan_digest: ...;
                                                reproducer: ...;
                                                schema_version: ...;
                                                stderr: ...;
                                                termination: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strict,
                                        >;
                                        operation: ZodString;
                                        parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                        predicate_type: ZodString;
                                        provider: ZodObject<{ id: ...; name: ...; version: ... }, $strip>;
                                        raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                                        schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                                        subject: ZodNullable<ZodObject<(...), (...)>>;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                            phase: ZodEnum<{ execute: "execute"; plan: "plan" }>;
                            plan: ZodNullable<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        cases: ZodArray<ZodObject<(...), (...)>>;
                                        determinism: ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                clock_iso: ...;
                                                locale: ...;
                                                platform: ...;
                                                random_seed: ...;
                                                timezone: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strict,
                                        >;

                                        filesystem: ZodObject<
                                            { host_writes: ...; private_tmpfs_bytes: ... },
                                            $strict,
                                        >;
                                        left: ZodObject<
                                            { entry_alias: ...; entry_export: ...; modules: ... },
                                            $strict,
                                        >;
                                        limits: ZodObject<
                                            {

                                                input_bytes: ...;
                                                memory_bytes: ...;
                                                module_bytes: ...;
                                                output_bytes: ...;
                                                protocol_bytes: ...;
                                                result_depth: ...;
                                                result_nodes: ...;
                                                stderr_bytes: ...;
                                                tasks: ...;
                                                tmpfs_bytes: ...;
                                                wall_time_ms: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strict,
                                        >;
                                        network: ZodLiteral<"none">;
                                        plan_digest: ZodString;
                                        policy_sha256: ZodString;
                                        policy_version: ZodLiteral<"linux-bwrap-systemd-v1">;
                                        reproducer_export: ZodNullable<ZodObject<(...), (...)>>;
                                        right: ZodOptional<ZodObject<(...), (...)>>;
                                        runtime: ZodObject<
                                            { executable: ...; read_only_files: ...; worker: ... },
                                            $strict,
                                        >;
                                        sandbox: ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                bubblewrap: ...;
                                                seccomp_sha256: ...;
                                                shell: ...;
                                                systemctl: ...;
                                                systemd_run: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strict,
                                        >;
                                        schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                            source_evidence: ZodArray<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        analysis_profile: ZodOptional<ZodObject<(...), (...)>>;
                                        authority: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                "analyst-inference": ...;
                                                "controlled-replay": ...;
                                                "external-service": ...;
                                                "historical-reference": ...;
                                                "shipped-artifact": ...;
                                            },
                                        >;

                                        environment: ZodNullable<ZodObject<(...), (...)>>;

                                        evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        locations: ZodArray<ZodDiscriminatedUnion<(...), (...)>>;
                                        normalized_result: ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                cleanup: ...;
                                                comparison: ...;
                                                limitations: ...;
                                                outcomes: ...;
                                                plan_digest: ...;
                                                reproducer: ...;
                                                schema_version: ...;
                                                stderr: ...;
                                                termination: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strict,
                                        >;

                                        parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                        predicate_type: ZodString;
                                        provider: ZodObject<{ id: ...; name: ...; version: ... }, $strip>;
                                        raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                                        schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                                        subject: ZodNullable<ZodObject<(...), (...)>>;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                        },
                        $strict,
                    >;
                    schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                    transformation: ZodObject<
                        {
                            artifact_path: ZodString;
                            inserted_ranges: ZodArray<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        byte_end: ZodNumber;
                                        byte_start: ZodNumber;
                                        inserted_sha256: ZodString;
                                        purpose: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                "export-binding": ...;
                                                "factory-prefix": ...;
                                                "factory-suffix": ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                            instrumented_byte_length: ZodNumber;
                            instrumented_sha256: ZodString;
                            kind: ZodLiteral<"commonjs-factory-export-v1">;
                            original_byte_length: ZodNumber;
                            original_sha256: ZodString;
                            output_format: ZodLiteral<"commonjs-factory">;
                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            selected_range: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    byte_end: ZodNumber;
                                    byte_start: ZodNumber;
                                    selected_sha256: ZodString;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;
                            source_map: ZodLiteral<null>;
                        },
                        $strict,
                    >;
                    transformation_evidence: ZodUnion<
                        readonly [
                            ZodObject<
                                {
                                    analysis_profile: ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            digest: ZodString;
                                            parameters: ZodRecord<(...), (...)>;
                                            provider: ZodObject<(...), (...)>;
                                            provider_profile_schema_version: ZodNumber;
                                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<(...)>;
                                        },
                                        $strip,
                                    >;

                                        {
                                            "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                                            "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                                            "external-service": "external-service";
                                            "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                                            "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    confidence: ZodEnum<
                                        {
                                            derived: "derived";
                                            inferred: "inferred";
                                            observed: "observed";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    environment: ZodNullable<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            { architecture: ...; id: ...; isolation: ...; platform: ... },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    evidence_id: ZodString;
                                    evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    locations: ZodArray<
                                        ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                                            [(...), (...), (...), (...), (...)],
                                            "kind",
                                        >,
                                    >;

                                    operation: ZodString;
                                    parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                    predicate_type: ZodString;
                                    provider: ZodObject<
                                        { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodNullable<(...)> },
                                        $strip,
                                    >;
                                    raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                                    schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                                    subject: ZodNullable<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                architecture: ...;
                                                digest: ...;
                                                format: ...;
                                                local_path: ...;
                                                name: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >,

                                {
                                    authority: ZodEnum<
                                        {
                                            "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                                            "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                                            "external-service": "external-service";
                                            "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                                            "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    confidence: ZodEnum<
                                        {
                                            derived: "derived";
                                            inferred: "inferred";
                                            observed: "observed";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    environment: ZodNullable<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            { architecture: ...; id: ...; isolation: ...; platform: ... },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    evidence_id: ZodString;
                                    evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    locations: ZodArray<
                                        ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                                            [(...), (...), (...), (...), (...)],
                                            "kind",
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    normalized_result: ZodJSONSchema;
                                    operation: ZodString;
                                    parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                    predicate_type: ZodString;
                                    provider: ZodObject<
                                        { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodNullable<(...)> },
                                        $strip,
                                    >;
                                    raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                                    schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                                    subject: ZodNullable<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                architecture: ...;
                                                digest: ...;
                                                format: ...;
                                                local_path: ...;
                                                name: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >,
                        ],
                    >;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
            title: string;
        },
        {
            annotations: DerivedToolAnnotations;
            description: "Recompute and execute one separately approved exact Node characterization plan in the owned controlled-replay boundary. Returns transformation, replay, cleanup, and provider-neutral characterization Evidence v2; stale plans fail before execution.";
            effects: ToolEffects;
            examples: readonly [
                {
                    input: {
                        approved_plan_sha256: string;
                        execution_approved: true;
                        preparation: Record<string, JSONType>;
                    };
                    title: "Execute one approved exact characterization plan";
                },
            ];
            inputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    approved_plan_sha256: ZodString;
                    execution_approved: ZodLiteral<true>;
                    preparation: ZodObject<
                        {
                            expected_effect: ZodEnum<
                                { "observation-only": "observation-only"; pure: "pure" },
                            >;
                            instrumentation: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    artifact_path: ZodString;
                                    artifact_sha256: ZodString;
                                    selection: ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            byte_end: ZodNumber;
                                            byte_start: ZodNumber;
                                            export_name: ZodString;
                                            selected_sha256: ZodString;
                                        },
                                        $strict,
                                    >;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;
                            preparation_approved: ZodLiteral<true>;
                            replay: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    approved: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                                    cases: ZodDefault<ZodArray<ZodObject<(...), (...)>>>;
                                    determinism: ZodDefault<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                clock_iso: ...;
                                                locale: ...;
                                                platform: ...;
                                                random_seed: ...;
                                                timezone: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strict,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    generator: ZodOptional<
                                        ZodObject<{ count: ...; preset: ...; seed: ... }, $strict>,
                                    >;
                                    left: ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            entry_alias: ZodString;
                                            entry_export: ZodDefault<(...)>;
                                            modules: ZodArray<(...)>;
                                        },
                                        $strict,
                                    >;
                                    limits: ZodDefault<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                cpu_quota_percent: ...;
                                                input_bytes: ...;
                                                memory_bytes: ...;
                                                module_bytes: ...;
                                                output_bytes: ...;
                                                protocol_bytes: ...;
                                                result_depth: ...;
                                                result_nodes: ...;
                                                stderr_bytes: ...;
                                                tasks: ...;
                                                tmpfs_bytes: ...;
                                                wall_time_ms: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strict,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    mode: ZodEnum<{ execute: "execute"; plan: "plan" }>;
                                    plan_digest: ZodOptional<ZodString>;
                                    reproducer_export: ZodOptional<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            { approved: ...; include_sources: ...; path: ... },
                                            $strict,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    right: ZodOptional<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            { entry_alias: ...; entry_export: ...; modules: ... },
                                            $strict,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;
                            selected_alias: ZodString;
                        },
                        $strict,
                    >;
                },
                $strict,
            >;

                        {
                            allowed_boundaries: ZodArray<ZodString>;

                                $strict,
                            >;

                                {

                                    network: ZodEnum<{ loopback: "loopback"; none: "none" }>;
                                    preparation_approved: ZodLiteral<true>;

                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;

                                },
                                $strict,

                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;

                            >;

                                    max_calls: ZodNumber;
                                    max_files: ZodNumber;
                                    max_handles: ZodNumber;
                                    max_processes: ZodNumber;
                                    timeout_ms: ZodNumber;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;

                            runtime: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    executable_path: ZodString;
                                    executable_sha256: ZodString;
                                    family: ZodString;
                                    profile_sha256: ZodString;
                                    provider_id: ZodString;
                                    version: ZodString;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;
                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            working_directory: ZodString;
                        },
                        $strict,
                    >;
                    replay: ZodObject<
                        {
                            evidence: ZodNullable<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        analysis_profile: ZodOptional<ZodObject<(...), (...)>>;
                                        authority: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                "analyst-inference": ...;
                                                "controlled-replay": ...;
                                                "external-service": ...;
                                                "historical-reference": ...;
                                                "shipped-artifact": ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        confidence: ZodEnum<{ derived: ...; inferred: ...; observed: ... }>;
                                        environment: ZodNullable<ZodObject<(...), (...)>>;
                                        evidence_id: ZodString;
                                        evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        locations: ZodArray<ZodDiscriminatedUnion<(...), (...)>>;
                                        normalized_result: ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                cleanup: ...;
                                                comparison: ...;
                                                limitations: ...;
                                                outcomes: ...;
                                                plan_digest: ...;
                                                reproducer: ...;
                                                schema_version: ...;
                                                stderr: ...;
                                                termination: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strict,
                                        >;
                                        operation: ZodString;
                                        parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                        predicate_type: ZodString;
                                        provider: ZodObject<{ id: ...; name: ...; version: ... }, $strip>;
                                        raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                                        schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;

                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                            phase: ZodEnum<{ execute: "execute"; plan: "plan" }>;
                            plan: ZodNullable<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        cases: ZodArray<ZodObject<(...), (...)>>;
                                        determinism: ZodObject<
                                            {

                                                locale: ...;
                                                platform: ...;
                                                random_seed: ...;
                                                timezone: ...;

                                            $strict,
                                        >;

                                            $strict,
                                        >;

                                                input_bytes: ...;
                                                memory_bytes: ...;
                                                module_bytes: ...;

                                                protocol_bytes: ...;
                                                result_depth: ...;

                                                stderr_bytes: ...;
                                                tasks: ...;
                                                tmpfs_bytes: ...;
                                                wall_time_ms: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strict,
                                        >;

                                        policy_sha256: ZodString;

                                            $strict,
                                        >;

                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;

                                        schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                                        subject: ZodNullable<ZodObject<(...), (...)>>;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                        },
                        $strict,
                    >;
                    schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                    transformation: ZodObject<
                        {
                            artifact_path: ZodString;
                            inserted_ranges: ZodArray<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        byte_end: ZodNumber;
                                        byte_start: ZodNumber;
                                        inserted_sha256: ZodString;

                                            {
                                                "export-binding": ...;
                                                "factory-prefix": ...;
                                                "factory-suffix": ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                            instrumented_byte_length: ZodNumber;
                            instrumented_sha256: ZodString;
                            kind: ZodLiteral<"commonjs-factory-export-v1">;
                            original_byte_length: ZodNumber;
                            original_sha256: ZodString;
                            output_format: ZodLiteral<"commonjs-factory">;
                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            selected_range: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    byte_end: ZodNumber;
                                    byte_start: ZodNumber;
                                    selected_sha256: ZodString;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;
                            source_map: ZodLiteral<null>;
                        },
                        $strict,
                    >;
                    transformation_evidence: ZodUnion<
                        readonly [
                            ZodObject<
                                {
                                    analysis_profile: ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            digest: ZodString;
                                            parameters: ZodRecord<(...), (...)>;

                                        },
                                    >;

                                        ZodObject<

                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;

                                    evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    locations: ZodArray<
                                        ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                                            [(...), (...), (...), (...), (...)],
                                            "kind",
                                        >,
                                    >;

                                    operation: ZodString;
                                    parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                    predicate_type: ZodString;
                                    provider: ZodObject<
                                        { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodNullable<(...)> },
                                        $strip,
                                    >;
                                    raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                                    schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                                    subject: ZodNullable<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                architecture: ...;
                                                digest: ...;
                                                format: ...;
                                                local_path: ...;
                                                name: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >,
                            ZodObject<
                                {
                                    authority: ZodEnum<
                                        {
                                            "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                                            "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                                            "external-service": "external-service";
                                            "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                                            "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    confidence: ZodEnum<
                                        {
                                            derived: "derived";
                                            inferred: "inferred";
                                            observed: "observed";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    environment: ZodNullable<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            { architecture: ...; id: ...; isolation: ...; platform: ... },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    evidence_id: ZodString;
                                    evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    locations: ZodArray<
                                        ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                                            [(...), (...), (...), (...), (...)],
                                            "kind",
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    normalized_result: ZodJSONSchema;
                                    operation: ZodString;
                                    parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                    predicate_type: ZodString;
                                    provider: ZodObject<
                                        { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodNullable<(...)> },
                                        $strip,
                                    >;
                                    raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                                    schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                                    subject: ZodNullable<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                architecture: ...;
                                                digest: ...;
                                                format: ...;
                                                local_path: ...;
                                                name: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >,
                        ],
                    >;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
            title: string;
        },
        {
            annotations: DerivedToolAnnotations;
            description: "Atomically commit one canonical evidence-backed reconstruction coverage workspace revision under an approved root. CAS revisions reject lost updates; every Evidence and residual-unknown reference must resolve in the embedded canonical bundle.";
            effects: ToolEffects;
            examples: readonly [
                {
                    input: {
                        approved: true;
                        expected_revision: null;
                        workspace: Record<string, JSONType>;
                        workspace_path: "/approved/coverage.json";
                    };
                    title: "Commit the first canonical coverage revision";
                },
            ];
            inputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    approved: ZodLiteral<true>;
                    expected_revision: ZodNullable<ZodNumber>;
                    workspace: ZodObject<
                        {
                            artifacts: ZodArray<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        artifact_id: ZodString;
                                        artifact_sha256: ZodString;
                                        environment_sha256: ZodString;
                                        evidence_ids: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        version: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                            boundaries: ZodArray<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        allowed_dispositions: ZodArray<ZodEnum<(...)>>;
                                        allowed_unknown_ids: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        boundary_id: ZodString;
                                        required_claim_ids: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        required_package_proof_kinds: ZodArray<ZodEnum<(...)>>;
                                        required_surface_ids: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        title: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                            claims: ZodArray<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        claim_id: ZodString;
                                        kind: ZodString;
                                        required_authority: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                "controlled-replay": ...;
                                                external: ...;
                                                "live-observation": ...;
                                                "shipped-artifact": ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        required_dimensions: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        surface_ids: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        title: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                            contradictions: ZodArray<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        claim_ids: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        contradiction_id: ZodString;
                                        evidence_ids: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        status: ZodEnum<{ active: ...; resolved: ... }>;
                                        surface_ids: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                            evidence_bundle: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    artifacts: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            { architecture: ...; digest: ...; format: ... },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    bundle_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                                    captures: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<{ evidence_id: ...; predicate_type: ... }, $strip>,
                                    >;
                                    environments: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            { architecture: ...; id: ...; isolation: ...; platform: ... },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    providers: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<{ id: ...; name: ...; version: ... }, $strip>,
                                    >;
                                    records: ZodArray<ZodUnion<readonly [(...), (...)]>>;
                                    scenarios: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            { authority: ...; evidence_id: ...; operation: ... },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    unknowns: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                contradicting_evidence_ids: ...;
                                                domain: ...;
                                                mutation_evidence_ids: ...;
                                                previous_revision_digest: ...;
                                                question: ...;
                                                recommended_probes: ...;
                                                registry_version: ...;
                                                relationships: ...;
                                                required_authority: ...;
                                                required_confidence: ...;
                                                required_environment: ...;
                                                resolution: ...;
                                                revision: ...;
                                                revision_digest: ...;
                                                scope_digest: ...;
                                                severity: ...;
                                                status: ...;
                                                supporting_evidence_ids: ...;
                                                unknown_id: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            name: ZodString;
                            owners: ZodArray<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        ownership: ZodDiscriminatedUnion<[(...), (...)], "disposition">;
                                        surface_id: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                            package_proofs: ZodArray<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        artifact_sha256s: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        evidence_ids: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        kind: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                "authority-independence": ...;
                                                build: ...;
                                                "clean-install": ...;
                                                "package-contents": ...;
                                                "runtime-routing": ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        proof_id: ZodString;
                                        status: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                fail: ...;
                                                pass: ...;
                                                skipped: ...;
                                                unknown: ...;
                                                unsupported: ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                            previous_revision_sha256: ZodNullable<ZodString>;
                            residual_unknown_ids: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            revision: ZodNumber;
                            revision_sha256: ZodString;
                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            surfaces: ZodArray<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        artifact_id: ZodString;
                                        authority: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                derived: ...;
                                                external: ...;
                                                historical: ...;
                                                inferred: ...;
                                                observed: ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        dependency_surface_ids: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        evidence_ids: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        family: ZodString;
                                        location: ZodString;
                                        occurrence_id: ZodNullable<ZodString>;
                                        surface_id: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                            verifier_contracts: ZodArray<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        authority: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                "controlled-replay": ...;
                                                external: ...;
                                                "live-observation": ...;
                                                "shipped-artifact": ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        claim_ids: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        contract_sha256: ZodString;
                                        dimensions: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        max_age_ms: ZodNumber;
                                        minimum_repeats: ZodNumber;
                                        normalization_removes_dimensions: ZodLiteral<false>;
                                        normalization_sha256: ZodString;
                                        verifier_id: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                            verifier_results: ZodArray<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        artifact_sha256s: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        contract_sha256: ZodString;
                                        covered_claim_ids: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        covered_dimensions: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        evidence_ids: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        normalization_sha256: ZodString;
                                        observed_at: ZodString;
                                        owner_sha256s: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        repeats: ZodNumber;
                                        status: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                fail: ...;
                                                pass: ...;
                                                skipped: ...;
                                                truncated: ...;
                                                unknown: ...;
                                                unsupported: ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        verifier_id: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                            workspace_id: ZodString;
                        },
                        $strict,
                    >;
                    workspace_path: ZodString;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
            kind: "application";
            name: "commit_reconstruction_coverage";
            outputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    bytes: ZodNumber;
                    evidence_records: ZodNumber;
                    revision: ZodNumber;
                    revision_sha256: ZodString;
                    workspace_id: ZodString;
                    workspace_path: ZodString;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
            title: string;
        },
        {
            annotations: DerivedToolAnnotations;
            description: "Evaluate one named reconstruction boundary from a canonical coverage workspace. Missing ownership or inventory is partial; stale, weak, truncated, skipped, or unresolved proof is unknown; contradictions, failed proof, missing owners, and authority routing fail closed.";
            effects: ToolEffects;
            examples: readonly [
                {
                    input: {
                        boundary_id: "replacement.cli";
                        workspace_path: "/approved/coverage.json";
                    };
                    title: "Evaluate one replacement boundary";
                },
            ];
            inputSchema: ZodObject<
                { boundary_id: ZodString; workspace_path: ZodString },
                $strict,
            >;
            kind: "application";
            name: "query_reconstruction_coverage";
            outputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    boundary_id: ZodString;
                    evidence_ids: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                    reasons: ZodArray<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                code: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        "active-contradiction": "active-contradiction";
                                        "active-unknown": "active-unknown";
                                        "authority-routing-detected": "authority-routing-detected";
                                        "authority-routing-unknown": "authority-routing-unknown";
                                        "claim-missing": "claim-missing";
                                        "dependency-surface-missing": "dependency-surface-missing";
                                        "disposition-not-allowed": "disposition-not-allowed";
                                        "owner-distribution-unknown": "owner-distribution-unknown";
                                        "owner-duplicate": "owner-duplicate";
                                        "owner-missing": "owner-missing";
                                        "owner-path-missing": "owner-path-missing";
                                        "owner-path-unknown": "owner-path-unknown";
                                        "owner-undistributed": "owner-undistributed";
                                        "package-proof-failed": "package-proof-failed";
                                        "package-proof-missing": "package-proof-missing";
                                        "package-proof-unknown": "package-proof-unknown";
                                        "surface-missing": "surface-missing";
                                        "verifier-duplicate": "verifier-duplicate";
                                        "verifier-failed": "verifier-failed";
                                        "verifier-missing": "verifier-missing";
                                        "verifier-result-incompatible": "verifier-result-incompatible";
                                        "verifier-result-missing": "verifier-result-missing";
                                        "verifier-result-stale": "verifier-result-stale";
                                        "verifier-unknown": "verifier-unknown";
                                    },
                                >;
                                detail: ZodString;
                                subject_id: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strict,
                        >,
                    >;
                    recommended_probes: ZodArray<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                operation: ZodString;
                                rationale: ZodString;
                                subject_id: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strict,
                        >,
                    >;
                    status: ZodEnum<
                        {
                            failed: "failed";
                            partial: "partial";
                            ready: "ready";
                            unknown: "unknown";
                        },
                    >;
                    summary: ZodObject<
                        {
                            reasons: ZodNumber;
                            required_claims: ZodNumber;
                            required_surfaces: ZodNumber;
                        },
                        $strict,
                    >;
                    workspace_revision_sha256: ZodString;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
            title: string;
        },
        ToolContract<"open_binary">,
        ToolContract<"close_binary">,
        ToolContract<"binary_session">,
        ToolContract<"export_evidence_bundle">,
        ToolContract<"import_evidence_bundle">,

        ToolContract<"compare_process_captures">,
        ToolContract<"compare_artifacts">,

        ToolContract<"find_changed_behavior">,
        ToolContract<"build_call_path">,
        ToolContract<"correlate_static_and_runtime">,
        ToolContract<"verify_reconstruction">,
        ToolContract<"list_unknowns">,
        ToolContract<"record_unknown">,
        ToolContract<"update_unknown">,
        ToolContract<"verify_unknown_resolution">,
    ] = ...
